query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name') FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='zfs_pool_health' AND JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name')!='' ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, max(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='zfs_pool_health' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='zfs_pool_health' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, max(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='zfs_pool_allocated_bytes' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='zfs_pool_allocated_bytes' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, avg(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='zfs_pool_deduplication_ratio' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='zfs_pool_deduplication_ratio' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, avg(v) AS frag FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='zfs_pool_fragmentation_ratio' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='zfs_pool_fragmentation_ratio' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, name, max(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'name') AS name, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'type') AS type, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='zfs_dataset_used_bytes' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='zfs_dataset_used_bytes' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, name, type, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND type='filesystem' AND name LIKE '%/%' GROUP BY time, name ORDER BY time

SELECT time, max(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='zfs_pool_free_bytes' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='zfs_pool_free_bytes' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, name, max(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'name') AS name, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'type') AS type, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='zfs_dataset_referenced_bytes' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='zfs_dataset_referenced_bytes' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, name, type, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND type='filesystem' AND name LIKE '%/%' GROUP BY time, name ORDER BY time

SELECT time, name, max(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'name') AS name, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'type') AS type, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='zfs_dataset_written_bytes' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='zfs_dataset_written_bytes' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, name, type, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND type='filesystem' AND name LIKE '%/%' GROUP BY time, name ORDER BY time

SELECT time, state, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'state') AS state, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.memory.usage' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.memory.usage' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, state, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, state ORDER BY time

SELECT time, mountpoint, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'mountpoint') AS mountpoint, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'state') AS state, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.filesystem.usage' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.filesystem.usage' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, mountpoint, state, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND state='used' GROUP BY time, mountpoint ORDER BY time

SELECT time, avg(v) AS load FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.cpu.load_average.1m' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.cpu.load_average.1m' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, direction, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, direction, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'direction') AS direction, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.network.io' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.network.io' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, direction, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, direction ORDER BY time
